domain_name: Precipitation, Weather, and Climate Forecasting via Deep Learning

background_concepts.concept: Reanalysis datasets (e.g., ERA5) as gridded ground truth for weather ML
background_concepts.why_needed: WeatherBench and ClimateNet build benchmarks on reanalysis grids but assume the reader knows what a reanalysis product is and how it differs from direct observations.

suggested_resources.title: ERA5: How to download and understand reanalysis (ECMWF)

domain_name: Streamflow and Hydrological Modeling with ML

background_concepts.why_needed: These readings apply LSTMs to streamflow and drought/flood time series but do not explain the gated recurrent architecture or the vanishing-gradient problem it solves.

suggested_resources.title: Understanding LSTM Networks (colah's blog)
Introduction to Long Short Term Memory (GeeksforGeeks)

domain_name: Flood and Drought Risk Modeling and Impact Estimation

background_concepts.concept: Flood exposure vs. hazard vs. vulnerability framing
background_concepts.why_needed: These impact-estimation papers use the risk = hazard × exposure × vulnerability decomposition as a given without defining the terms.

suggested_resources.title: Understanding Disaster Risk (UNDRR PreventionWeb)

domain_name: AI Flood Mapping and Forecasting from Satellite Data

background_concepts.concept: Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) backscatter for water detection
background_concepts.why_needed: Satellite flood mapping relies on the fact that calm water yields low SAR backscatter (specular reflection), a physical principle assumed but not taught.

suggested_resources.title: Flood mapping with Synthetic Aperture Radar (EO4GEO course)

domain_name: Satellite Land Cover and Water Body Segmentation

background_concepts.why_needed: Land-cover and water-body mapping papers assume familiarity with pixel-wise classification via encoder-decoder architectures.

suggested_resources.title: A Beginner's guide to Deep Learning based Semantic Segmentation
Semantic segmentation for land use/land cover (DevelopmentSeed)

background_concepts.concept: Sentinel-2 multispectral bands and spectral indices (NDVI)
background_concepts.why_needed: Irrigation and land-cover papers operate on Sentinel-2 bands and vegetation indices without explaining band resolutions or index formulas.

suggested_resources.title: Sentinel-2 Bands and Combinations (GIS Geography)
NDVI (NASA Earthdata)

background_concepts.concept: Nighttime lights (DMSP-OLS / VIIRS DNB) as a proxy for economic activity
background_concepts.why_needed: These papers use nighttime-light radiance to estimate poverty and development, assuming knowledge of the light-GDP relationship and the VIIRS sensor.

suggested_resources.title: Nighttime Lights (NASA Earthdata)
Intro to Sentinel-2 & VIIRS (World Bank Open Nighttime Lights)

domain_name: Satellite Imagery Analysis for Environmental and Socio-economic Monitoring

background_concepts.why_needed: The building-damage interpretability paper assumes the reader understands convolutional feature hierarchies and attribution methods for explaining CNN predictions.

suggested_resources.title: An overview of semantic image segmentation (Jeremy Jordan)

background_concepts.why_needed: The downscaling paper works with MOD16A2 evapotranspiration data, assuming the reader knows what ET is and how it is remotely estimated.

suggested_resources.title: Evapotranspiration (USGS Water Science School)

domain_name: AI for Climate Policy and Ecosystem Valuation

background_concepts.concept: Environmental justice as a policy framework
background_concepts.why_needed: The Atlanta environmental-justice paper assumes the reader understands the concept of distributional environmental burden on marginalized communities.

suggested_resources.title: Learn About Environmental Justice (US EPA)

background_concepts.concept: Weak supervision / weak labels for ML
background_concepts.why_needed: Xingu addresses weak-supervision geospatial predictions, assuming familiarity with training under noisy or incomplete labels.

suggested_resources.title: Weak Supervision: A New Programming Paradigm (Stanford AI Lab)

background_concepts.why_needed: Drought monitoring readings use vegetation greenness anomalies as drought signals without explaining how NDVI relates to vegetation stress.

suggested_resources.title: NDVI (USGS Landsat Missions)

domain_name: Climate Resilience Tools and Participatory Vulnerability Assessment for Rural Livelihoods

background_concepts.concept: MGNREGA and rural social-protection planning in India
background_concepts.why_needed: Participatory climate-resilience tools plug into MGNREGA natural-resource works and gram-panchayat planning, an institutional mechanism assumed but not explained.

suggested_resources.title: MGNREGA overview (Drishti IAS)

domain_name: Rural Water Supply Infrastructure Monitoring & Operations
Drinking Water Quality, Safety & Contamination Interventions

background_concepts.why_needed: The arsenic-safe-water study uses WTP survey methods to value a non-market good, assuming familiarity with the stated-preference/contingent valuation approach.

suggested_resources.title: Applications of the contingent valuation method in developing countries (FAO)

domain_name: Gender, Empowerment & Marginalization in Water Programs

background_concepts.why_needed: The women's water-quality monitoring paper frames its impact in terms of WASH empowerment, an institutional/programmatic acronym used without definition.

suggested_resources.title: WASH (Water, Sanitation and Hygiene) — UNICEF

domain_name: Flood & Disaster Risk Mapping and Response Systems

background_concepts.concept: Systems architecture / model-based systems engineering for disaster response
background_concepts.why_needed: The DRR systems-architecture paper assumes familiarity with formal systems-engineering practice for designing interoperable response systems.

suggested_resources.title: Systems Engineering Fundamentals (Defense Acquisition University guide)
